description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a dark gable roof and white exterior walls, surrounded by a wooden fence and landscaped with several trees and shrubs. The front features a covered porch with columns, a main entry door, and a driveway leading to an attached garage. The rear of the house includes a pergola-covered patio area, outdoor seating, and additional green space. Windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with a mix of rectangular and arched designs. The property is bordered by a low wooden fence, and the driveway provides access for vehicles. The overall design blends traditional and modern elements, creating a comfortable residential appearance.
description: A two-story white house with a dark gable roof, attached garage, covered porch, and fenced yard with trees and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry porch, driveway, garage, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and partial view of the backyard patio and trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pergola-covered patio, backyard, and multiple windows along the back wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side entry, additional windows, and more of the fenced yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with a mix of rectangular and arched windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, steps, and a prominent front door beneath an overhang
